en: Status: [OPTIMIZE] Fixed CJK signal pollution root cause (threshold 20→8), registered ghost gene gene_auto_a1cf499b as retired, made innovation.js skill-aware to prevent stale suggestions, corrected 3 narrative intent mismatches
zh: 状态: [优化] 修复CJK信号污染根因（阈值20→8），注册幽灵基因gene_auto_a1cf499b为退休，升级innovation.js为技能感知型防止过期建议，修正3处叙事意图错配
